name: Larrainvial Asset Management Administradora General - Fundo Inversion Tasas Chile Retorno Absoluto F
summary: Larrainvial Asset Management Administradora General - Fundo Inversion Tasas Chile Retorno Absoluto F invests in Chilean interest rates seeking absolute returns. It is managed by Larrainvial Asset Management Administradora General. The fund uses various strategies to profit from movements in Chilean interest rates, aiming for positive returns regardless of market direction.
